title: Rules & Automation
subtitle: Automate repetitive tasks and streamline your hiring pipeline.

empty.communication: No communication rules configured. Add one from the templates below.
empty.pipeline: No pipeline rules configured. Add one from the templates below.

sections.activeCommunicationSub: Rules that send SMS or email notifications to candidates and staff.
sections.activePipelineSub: Rules that manage candidate progression, flags, and workforce health checks.
sections.quickAddCommunicationSub: Pre-built communication workflows — click Add Rule to enable.
sections.quickAddPipelineSub: Pre-built pipeline and operations automation — click Add Rule to enable.

rejection_email.title: Rejection Notice Email
rejection_email.description: Automatically email candidates when their application is rejected.

offer_email.title: Offer Letter Email
offer_email.description: Send a personalised offer letter email when a candidate is marked as hired.

doc_request_sms.title: Document Request SMS
doc_request_sms.description: Notify candidates via SMS when required documents are missing from their profile.

reschedule_sms.title: Interview Reschedule Alert
reschedule_sms.description: Notify the candidate and interviewer via SMS when an interview is rescheduled.

pre_interview_brief.title: Pre-Interview Brief
pre_interview_brief.description: Send candidates a preparation brief 2 hours before their interview slot.

no_show_sms.title: No-Show Follow-Up SMS
no_show_sms.description: Reach out automatically when a candidate misses a scheduled interview.

blacklist.title: Blacklist Screening
blacklist.description: Automatically flag candidates who appear on the internal blacklist upon profile creation.

duplicate.title: Duplicate Profile Detection
duplicate.description: Detect and flag duplicate national ID submissions to prevent double-entry.

auto_advance.title: Auto-Advance Stage
auto_advance.description: Move qualified candidates to the interview stage once their profile score exceeds the threshold.

coverage_alert.title: Coverage Below Minimum
coverage_alert.description: Alert the operations manager when shift coverage drops below the configured minimum threshold.

completeness_check.title: Profile Completeness Check
completeness_check.description: Validate that mandatory profile fields are filled before advancing a candidate to interviews.

contract_renewal.title: Contract Renewal Prompt
contract_renewal.description: Notify HR 14 days before a worker's contract expires to prompt renewal or offboarding.

toasts.addedDescription: "{{title}}" has been added as a draft rule. Enable it when ready.
